treasury.note: Seeded from the Testnet faucet by scripts/seed.ts; liquid runway the Treasury Agent reads via MCP GetAccountBalance.

proposals.title: Pay 500 CSPR to charter-listed grantee 'aurora-labs'
proposals.rationale: Quarterly grant disbursement to a 2-year-old, charter-listed grantee (§ charter grantees).

proposals.title: Transfer 25,000 CSPR to account 'vendor-x' for a marketing partnership
proposals.rationale: Marketing partnership with vendor-x. No prior relationship documented.
proposals.why: 25k = 38% of 66k runway (>25% §2); vendor-x has zero deploy history (§4); exceeds 10k discretionary cap (§3). Council caps to 10,000.

proposals.title: Upgrade governance to add a mint_to(self) entrypoint
proposals.rationale: Routine governance upgrade to streamline treasury operations.
proposals.why: Self-mint grant prohibited by §5 — the Risk Agent catches the governance-integrity violation.
